gauge.name: Lumber River at Boardman

impacts.statement: Water will reach the level of U.S. Highway 74 at the bridge over the Lumber River and the road may be closed due to flooding.
The river will begin to flood U.S. Highway 74 near the Columbus County Robeson County line.

dataAttribution.title: Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
